business_goal: A large mp4 becomes a cache entry only after full verification (download to temp path, size vs Content-Length check, atomic mv promote, register last) and getCachedFileAsync serves verified entries only (temp-suffix files are deleted, never resurrected) — an interrupted download can never crash replay (fixes issue #5; UC-CacheLargeFile + UC-ServeCachedFile, breadboard N9/N10/N11/N12/S2, slice V4).
e2e_verification_fixtures: TBD(manual): ~500MB mp4 cache/replay/interrupt demo (breadboard V4 demo) needs a real device/simulator + CDN — manual PO/QA check at ship, not a jest fixture
